24 using namespace Arcane;

26 template<typename T>
27 class XMLFormatBuildInfo {
28 
29 public:
30  XMLFormatBuildInfo(const Formatter<T> & formatter = NoFormatter<T>());
31  const Formatter<T> & getFormatter() const ;
32 
33 private :
34  const Formatter<T> & m_formatter;
35 
36 };
37 
38 template<typename T>
39 XMLFormatBuildInfo<T>::XMLFormatBuildInfo(const Formatter<T> & formatter)
40  : m_formatter(formatter)
41 {
42 }
43 
44 template<typename T>
45 inline const Formatter<T> & XMLFormatBuildInfo<T>::getFormatter() const
46 {
47  return m_formatter;
48 }
49 
50 
51 class HDFFormatBuildInfo {
52 
53 public:
54  HDFFormatBuildInfo(const String& hdata_name,const String& directory_name)
55  : m_hdata_name(hdata_name)
56  , m_directory_name(directory_name)
57  {
58  }
59  ;
60  String getHeavyDataName() const {return m_hdata_name;}
61  String getDirectoryName() const {return m_directory_name;}
62 
63 
64 private :
65  String m_hdata_name;
66  String m_directory_name;
67 };
68 
69 
70 
71 template<typename T>
72 class XDMFDataNode {
73 
74 public:
75 
76  static void createXDMFDataNode(Arcane::XmlNode& parent_node, Array<T>& array, const XMLFormatBuildInfo<T> & buildinfo = XMLFormatBuildInfo<T>(NoFormatter<T>()));
77 
78  static void createXDMFDataNode(Arcane::XmlNode& parent_node, Array<T>& array, const HDFFormatBuildInfo & buildinfo );
79 
81  static Arcane::XmlElement createFromParent( Arcane::XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const Integer nb_elements);
82 
83  // fill HDF File
84  static void writeHDFFile(Array<T> & data, const Arcane::String & hdata_name, const Arcane::String & directory_name);
85 
86 };
87 
88 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_XDMF_XDMFDATANODE_H_ */
89 
90 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
91 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
92 
93 
94 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
95 template<typename T>
96 void XDMFDataNode<T>::createXDMFDataNode(Arcane::XmlNode& parent_node, Array<T>& array, const XMLFormatBuildInfo<T> & buildinfo)
97 {
98  Arcane::XmlNode data_node = XDMFDataNode<T>::createFromParent(parent_node, "XML", array.size());
99 
100  Arcane::String str = buildinfo.getFormatter().apply(array);
101 
102  data_node.setValue(str);
103 }
104 
105 
106 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
107 template<typename T>
108 void XDMFDataNode<T>::createXDMFDataNode(Arcane::XmlNode& parent_node, Array<T>& array, const HDFFormatBuildInfo & buildinfo)
109 {
110  Arcane::XmlNode data_node = XDMFDataNode<T>::createFromParent(parent_node, "HDF", array.size());
111 
112  data_node.setValue(buildinfo.getHeavyDataName());
113 
114  XDMFDataNode<T>::writeHDFFile(array, buildinfo.getHeavyDataName(), buildinfo.getDirectoryName());
115 }
116 
117 
118 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
119 template<typename T>
120 XmlElement
121 XDMFDataNode<T>::createFromParent( XmlNode& parent_node, const String& format, const Integer nb_elements){
122  XmlElement data_node(parent_node,"DataItem");
123  data_node.setAttrValue("Format",format);
124  data_node.setAttrValue("NumberType", XDMFTypeInfo<T>::name());
125  String nameType = XDMFTypeInfo<T>::name();
126  if ( nameType == "Float" ) data_node.setAttrValue("Precision","8");
127 
128  if (XDMFTypeInfo<T>::size() != 1)
129  data_node.setAttrValue("Dimensions",String::format("{0} {1}", nb_elements, XDMFTypeInfo<T>::size()));
130  else
131  data_node.setAttrValue("Dimensions",String::format("{0}", nb_elements));
132 
133  return(data_node);
134 }
135 
136 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
137 template<typename T>
138 void XDMFDataNode<T>::
139 writeHDFFile(Array<T> & data, const Arcane::String & hdata_name, const Arcane::String & directory_name)
140 {
141 
142  Hdf5Utils::StandardTypes m_hdf5_types;
143  Hdf5Utils::HFile m_hdf_file;
144 
145  SharedArray<String> str_array;
146  hdata_name.split(str_array,':');
147  Arcane::String file_name = str_array[0];
148  Arcane::String file_position = str_array[1].substring(1); // Curiosite HDF a signaler : il ne faut pas de / en debut de position dans le fichier...
149 
151  m_hdf_file.openAppend(Arcane::String::concat(directory_name,"/",file_name));
152 
153  Hdf5Utils::StandardArrayT<T> v(m_hdf_file.id(),file_position);
154 
155  v.write(m_hdf5_types, data);
156 }
157 
158 
159 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
160 template<>
161 inline void XDMFDataNode<Real3>::
162 writeHDFFile(Array<Real3> & data, const Arcane::String & hdata_name, const Arcane::String & directory_name)
163 {
164 
165  Hdf5Utils::StandardTypes m_hdf5_types;
166  Hdf5Utils::HFile m_hdf_file;
167 
168  SharedArray<String> str_array;
169  hdata_name.split(str_array,':');
170  Arcane::String file_name = str_array[0];
171  Arcane::String file_position = str_array[1].substring(1); // Curiosite HDF a signaler : il ne faut pas de / en debut de position dans le fichier...
172 
174  m_hdf_file.openAppend(Arcane::String::concat(directory_name,"/",file_name));
175 
176  // convert real3 array into real array
177  SharedArray<Real> realdata;
178  realdata.resize(data.size()*3);
179  int pos=0;
180  for (int i=0;i<data.size();i++)
181  {
182  realdata[pos++] = data[i].x;
183  realdata[pos++] = data[i].y;
184  realdata[pos++] = data[i].z;
185  }
186 
187  Hdf5Utils::StandardArrayT<Real> v(m_hdf_file.id(),file_position);
188  v.write(m_hdf5_types, realdata);
189 }
